description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped storage box made of sturdy green plastic, featuring reinforced edges and a solid base. The sides are designed with integrated horizontal and vertical ribbing for added structural strength, and there are large rectangular cutout handles on the shorter ends for easy carrying. The box has a utilitarian, industrial look, suitable for heavy-duty use in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or outdoor markets. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, allowing for the storage of various items. The surface has a matte finish with a slightly textured appearance, likely to provide grip and resist scratches. There are no visible lids, locks, or labeling areas, emphasizing its function as a general-purpose, stackable storage solution.
description: A green, open-topped plastic storage box with reinforced ribbing and large cutout handles on the short sides, designed for heavy-duty urban use. The box has a matte, slightly textured finish and a spacious interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short side with a large rectangular cutout handle and reinforced ribbing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the longer side with two smaller cutout handles and prominent horizontal and vertical ribbing.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, with a large rectangular cutout handle and reinforced structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other long side with two smaller cutout handles and ribbed reinforcement.
